name: Apify Actors
description: Access 6000+ web scrapers (Actors) via the hosted Apify MCP server. WORKFLOW: (1) search-actors with a broad platform keyword (e.g. 'instagram', 'google maps', 'tiktok') to find a specialized Actor — ALWAYS the first step. (2) fetch-actor-details to read the input schema. (3) call-actor with the matching input to run it. (4) optionally get-actor-output for full dataset items. The apify--rag-web-browser tool is a LAST-RESORT fallback ONLY when search-actors returns no relevant Actor; for plain webpage reads or web search use the Web Reader (Crawl4AI) and Web Search (SearXNG) tools instead, not this skill.

tools.name: search-actors
tools.description: Search the Apify Store to find scrapers/Actors by platform or keyword (e.g. 'Instagram', 'Amazon products'). Returns Actor cards with name, description, pricing, stats.

tools.name: fetch-actor-details
tools.description: Get full metadata for an Actor by name (e.g. 'apify/rag-web-browser'): description, input schema, README, pricing, output schema. Call this before call-actor.

tools.name: call-actor
tools.description: Run any Apify Actor synchronously or asynchronously. Takes 'actor' (username/name format) and 'input' (object matching the Actor's input schema). Returns datasetId + preview items.

tools.name: get-actor-run
tools.description: Check status and metadata of an Actor run by runId (status, timestamps, dataset reference).

tools.name: get-actor-output
tools.description: Fetch dataset items from an Actor run by datasetId. Supports field selection (dot notation) and pagination via offset/limit.

tools.name: search-apify-docs
tools.description: Full-text search over Apify Platform / Crawlee-JS / Crawlee-Python documentation. Returns matching doc URLs + snippets.

tools.name: fetch-apify-docs
tools.description: Fetch the full markdown content of a specific Apify or Crawlee documentation page by URL.

tools.name: apify--rag-web-browser
tools.description: Pre-bundled web browser Actor: queries Google Search, scrapes top N pages, returns content as Markdown. Use for immediate one-shot data retrieval ('current weather', 'fetch this URL').

bridge.auth_hint: Personal API token from Apify Console → Settings → Integrations (https://console.apify.com/settings/integrations). The free plan includes $5/month in platform credits.

credentials_required.label: Apify API Token
credentials_required.hint: Personal API token from Apify Console → Settings → Integrations. Free plan includes $5/month credits.

author: freddy-schuetz
